{{Quote|There is more fight in you than you would want me to believe there is.|[[Kirtan Loor]]|<ref name="X-Wing: Rogue Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>}}
'''Gil "Billey" Bastra''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] and former coworker who worked with [[Hal Horn]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Bastra helped [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] escape from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in order to avoid the [[Imperial Liaison]], [[Kirtan Loor]], by providing them with false identities. Unfortunately, Bastra was captured by Loor and interrogated. After one interrogation session, Bastra was immersed in [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]. This killed Bastra due to an [[Allergy/Legends|allergy]] he had previously developed from a contaminated batch of bacta from [[Lot ZX1449F]]. This contamination had also caused Bastra to contract [[blastonecrosis]], a fact which Loor had used in an unsuccessful attempt to break Bastra. The signs of the disease had been hidden because Bastra regularly took doses of [[lotiramine]], a chemical which interacted lethally with the truth serum [[Skirtopanol/Legends|skirtopanol]], to prevent Imperial agents from gaining information from him. Bastra's death was documented in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] transmission [[A34020121]].

==Behind the scenes==
In one scene, he is called "Gus Bastra."
